hero.title: USGAR Hotels
hero.subtitle: San Pedro, Cusco — Your gateway to the Andes

rooms.title: Our Rooms
rooms.description: Each room is uniquely designed with hand-painted Andean murals, warm lighting, and artisan textiles that celebrate Cusco's cultural heritage.

services.title: Everything You Need
services.description: From the moment you arrive, we take care of every detail to make your stay in Cusco unforgettable.

reviews.title: What Our Guests Say
reviews.description: Hear from travelers who have experienced USGAR Hotels

explore.description: Discover the wonders that await just outside your door
explore.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your filters or search keywords.
explore.schemaDescription: Discover the best historical, cultural, and natural destinations near USGAR Hotels in Cusco.

map.title: Find Us in Cusco
map.description: Located in the heart of San Pedro, steps from the historic market and a short walk to Plaza de Armas.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about your stay in Cusco: altitude sickness, check-in, transport, and more.

footer.findUs: Find us on your favorite travel platform

whatsapp.message: Hello! I would like to book a room at USGAR Hotels.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We would love to hear from you. Get in touch with our team for bookings, directions, or local travel advice.
contact.directionsDesc: USGAR Hotels is located in San Pedro, Cusco. We offer private airport pickups to ensure a safe and smooth arrival.
contact.airportPickupDesc: The airport is ~20 minutes away by car. We highly recommend booking our private pickup service to avoid unlicensed airport taxis.
contact.whatsappQuery: Hello! I have a question about USGAR Hotels.
contact.altitudeDesc: Cusco is at 3,400m altitude. We recommend taking it easy on your first day and drinking coca tea. We offer complimentary oxygen concentrators if needed.
contact.successMessage: Message sent successfully! We will get in touch with you shortly.

gallery.title: Photo Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Discover the beauty and details of USGAR Hotels in San Pedro, Cusco

about.title: Discover Our Essence
about.purpose: To create memorable experiences that allow every traveler to discover the essence of Cusco, providing a warm, personalized, and excellent service that makes every stay an unforgettable memory.
about.missionText: To provide a unique lodging experience in the heart of Cusco, offering personalized, warm, and high-quality service that combines comfort, hospitality, and the richness of local culture. We are committed to exceeding our guests' expectations through exceptional care, a passionate team, and sustainable tourism practices.
about.visionText: To be the benchmark hotel in Cusco, maintaining the essence of our culture. We aspire to be the first choice for travelers seeking excellence, warmth, and personalized service, distinguishing ourselves through our hospitality, innovation, and commitment to sustainability.

book.title: Book Your Stay
book.subtitle: Please enter the primary guest details and confirm your dates to proceed to secure checkout.
book.airportPickupCheckbox: Need a private pickup from the airport?
book.arrivalCalculationText: Transit time: ~20-30 minutes by car from Cusco Airport (CUZ).
book.estimatedArrivalNote: * Estimate based on 45 minutes (baggage claim + customs + transfer).
book.guaranteedText: Free cancellation up to 48 hours prior to check-in. Andean buffet breakfast included.
book.fillAllFields: Please fill out all required fields.
book.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
book.noPaymentUrl: No payment URL received from server.

exploreDetail.readyToExploreText: Book your stay at USGAR Hotels and discover all the wonders of Cusco and the Sacred Valley.

success.title: Booking Confirmed
success.confirmationMessage: Thank you for choosing USGAR Hotels. You will receive a confirmation email shortly with all the details of your stay.
success.notFoundMessage: We could not find the booking details. If you completed a payment, please contact us.
